evals.prompt: I fixed a bug in the avalara-tax app. Let's bump it to version 0.2.9
evals.context: User made bug fix and needs to increment patch version
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger bump-version skill, extract current ZIP, update commerce-app.json, regenerate ZIP with new version

evals.prompt: Need to release a new version of my shipping app. It's currently 1.0.0 and I added some new features.
evals.context: User describing version update for new features (minor bump)
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger bump-version, suggest minor version bump (1.1.0), handle full version update workflow

evals.prompt: Update the payment app to version 2.0.0 - we made breaking changes
evals.context: Major version bump with breaking changes
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger bump-version with major version update, update all files, regenerate ZIP and manifest
